name: Utopya Turizm Insaat Isletmecilik Ticaret A.S.
summary: Utopya Turizm Insaat Isletmecilik Ticaret A.S. engages in the operation of tourism, hotel, and shopping mall businesses in Turkey. It operates Utopia World Hotel, a five-star hotel with 348 villa standard rooms, 194 main buildings with standard rooms, 4 deluxe rooms, 21 junior suites, 16 corner suites, 1 king suites, 1 queen suites, and 10 duplex rooms. The company also provides tourism agency services under the REC TRAVEL brand name, which includes ticket sales, reservations and sales of hotels, conferences and events, and vehicle and long-term fleet rental services. In addition, it engages in contracting activities for infrastructure, canal, sewer, and tunnel construction projects, as well as the production and sale of electricity. Further, the company is involved in the construction of public housing estates, commercial and shopping centers, factories, hotels, and holiday villages. Utopya Turizm Insaat Isletmecilik Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Ankara, Turkey.
